    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    U

    update() - Method in class logic.entity.BaseProjectileAttack
    Advances projectile position and accumulates traveled distance.
    update() - Method in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Per-frame update entry point for movement, physics, attack flow, and UI helpers.
    updateAmmo() - Method in class logic.entity.characterClass.RangedClass
    Updates reload timer and restores ammo when reload duration is complete.
    updateAmmo() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Exorcist
    Completes reload when duration has elapsed and hides temporary weapon sprite.
    updateAmmo() - Method in interface logic.interfaces.UsesAmmo
    Updates reload/shooting timers each frame.
    updateAttack(Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characterClass.HybridClass
    Updates hybrid attack animation progression.
    updateAttack(Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characterClass.MeleeClass
    Updates melee animation frame progression.
    updateAttack(Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characterClass.RangedClass
    Updates ranged attack animation and resets state after frame duration.
    updateAttack(Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Barista
    No explicit per-frame attack animation update for this character.
    updateAttack(Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Exorcist
    Immediately returns player to walk state.
    updateAttack(Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Vampire
    Updates animation and marks strike frame for combat handling.
    updateAttack(Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.meleeCharacters.Hammer
    Updates animation and flags strike frame for hit processing.
    updateAttack(Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.meleeCharacters.Katana
    Updates animation and triggers hit state on strike frame.
    updateAttack(Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.meleeCharacters.Pyro
    Updates animation and immediately flags strike frame.
    updateAttack(Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Bubble
    Hides blower sprite after configured duration and resets attack state.
    updateAttack(Player) - Method in interface logic.interfaces.AttackAnimation
    Updates animation progression during game loop ticks.
    updateColor(double) - Method in class component.scene2.HealthBar
    health bar that reduces
    updateHitboxTimer() - Method in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Hides the temporary melee hitbox after its configured lifetime expires.
    UsedSkill - Enum constant in enum class logic.gameLogic.SkillState
    Skill has just been activated.
    UsesAmmo - Interface in logic.interfaces
    Contract for characters that use an ammo/reload shooting model.
    useSpecialSkill() - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Applies class-specific special skill effect.
    useSpecialSkill() - Method in class logic.entity.characterClass.HybridClass
    Temporarily increases attack by buff amount.
    useSpecialSkill() - Method in class logic.entity.characterClass.MeleeClass
    Temporarily increases defense by buff amount.
    useSpecialSkill() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Vampire
    Increases attack and life-steal multiplier while buff is active.
    useSpecialSkill() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Archer
    Archer skill increases both range and attack.
    useSpecialSkill() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Bubble
    Bubble skill increases attack value.
    useSpecialSkill() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Mage
    Mage skill heals by buff amount.
